name: Middle Eastern Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups lentils, dried, sorted and rinsed (10 oz.)
1 tablespoon beef bouillon granules, reduced sodium
4 cups zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch slices (2 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and lentils to boiling in a nonstick Dutch oven; reduce heat.
2. Cover and simmer about 30 minutes or until the lentils are almost tender.
3. Stir in potatoes, onion, celery, garlic, parsley, bouillon granules, cumin, and salt. Cover and simmer about 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Stir in zucchini. Cover and simmer 10 to 15 minutes or until the zucchini is tender.
5. Serve with lemon wedges.
Serves 6
